title: Kilrock PRO Multi-Use Floor Cleaner - Concentrated formulation cleans and deodorises - Leaves a streak-free shine - Suitable for most hard floor surfaces, White
features: ✓ KILROCK PRO MULTI-USE FLOOR CLEANER. Concentrated formulation makes up to 80 litres
✓ EFFICIENT AND SPECIALISED. High performance formulation cleans, deodorises and leaves a streak-free shine
✓ ULTRA VERSATILE. Works on most hard surface floors to shift grease, dirt and scuffs
✓ EASY TO USE. Dilute to suit and mop — no need to rinse!
✓ MADE IN THE UK. From our factory in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, we design, formulate, blend, fill, pack, sell and distribute a full range of specialist household problem-solving and cleaning products
description: Product Description KilrockPRO Multi-Use Floor Cleaner is a professional strength universal solution, which powerfully & quickly cleans & deodourises tile, laminate, sealed wood & most other hard floor surfaces. Ingredients Disodium metacilicate, 5%aliphatic hydrocarbons, <5% EDTA and salts thereof
